landing.headline: Turn self-education into a clear learning flow.
landing.subheadline: Ordo connects learning paths, focused sessions, notes, resources, and practice so you always know what to study next.
landing.smallNote: Designed for students, self-learners, and builders who study deeply.
landing.heroSubtitle: Ordo keeps your roadmap, current topic, session work, notes, resources, and practice in one continuous learning context.
landing.heroPointContext: Current path, topic, and next action stay visible.
landing.heroPointEvidence: Progress is based on sessions, notes, resources, and practice.
landing.heroPointPrivate: Built as a private workspace, not a social feed.
landing.todayPanelDesc: The workspace opens around the next useful learning move.
landing.sessionGoalValue: Understand semantic page structure and accessible landmarks.
landing.sessionNextValue: Capture one note, then complete one practice attempt.
landing.workspaceTitle: A private workspace that opens on the next useful move.
landing.workspaceDesc: No feed, no dashboard noise. Just the current path, current topic, active session, and the evidence needed to finish it.
landing.missionDesc: Continue Semantic HTML, capture one useful note, then reinforce it with practice.
landing.mapDesc: Every artifact belongs to a topic.
landing.signalDesc: The product is organized around continuity, not storage.
landing.previewEvidenceValue: Notes, resources, and practice stay attached

signal.contextDesc: Paths, topics, sessions, and evidence remain connected.
signal.focusDesc: The workspace makes the next learning step obvious.
signal.evidenceDesc: Completion follows sessions, notes, resources, and practice.

sessions.title: Focus Sessions
sessions.desc: Study one topic at a time.

plan.title: Plan
plan.desc: Create a path and define topics.

auth.contextNote: Sessions, notes, resources, and practice stay tied to the same topic.
auth.name: Name
auth.securityNote: Authentication is private-first. Passwords are never stored in plain text.
auth.signInHeroTitle: Return to the learning context you were building.
auth.signInHeroDesc: Access the workspace where paths, sessions, notes, resources, and practice stay connected around your current topic.
auth.signInDesc: Use your Ordo credentials to continue your private learning flow.
auth.registeredNotice: Account created. Sign in to continue.
auth.signUpHeroTitle: Build a quiet place for structured self-education.
auth.signUpHeroDesc: Start with a private workspace for learning paths, focused sessions, durable notes, resources, and deliberate practice.
auth.signUpDesc: Create your Ordo workspace and start from one clear learning context.
auth.recoveryHeroTitle: Recover access without breaking your learning flow.
auth.recoveryHeroDesc: Password recovery is prepared for the auth flow. Email delivery will be connected in a later security phase.
auth.recoveryDesc: Enter your email and Ordo will use this flow for future recovery emails.

onboarding.title: Create the first path your workspace can organize around.
onboarding.subtitle: Ordo works best when every session, note, resource, and practice task belongs to a clear topic. Start with one path and one concrete topic.
onboarding.cardTitle: Set up your first learning thread
onboarding.cardDescription: Keep it narrow. You can add more paths and topics once the first flow is in place.
onboarding.pathDescriptionPlaceholder: What should this path help you learn?

path.title: Path first
path.desc: Learning starts with a roadmap, not scattered tasks.

session.title: Focused sessions
session.desc: Work on one topic at a time.

knowledge.title: Durable knowledge
knowledge.desc: Notes and resources stay attached to context.

nav.sidebarNoActiveDesc: Open a path, pick a topic, and start a session.

today.title: Today
today.subtitle: What should I do right now?
today.intakeItemsWaiting: {count} captured item waiting for a topic. | {count} captured items waiting for a topic.
today.inboxDescription: Items not yet assigned to any learning topic.
today.createFirstPathDesc: Create a learning path and topic to start focused work.
today.startSessionGoal: Start a session, then capture notes and log practice attempts.
today.createTopicGoal: Create a topic inside a path to begin a session.
today.createPathNextStep: Create a path and select a topic
today.learningPulseActive: You have an active focus thread. Continue it before starting new work.
today.learningPulseQuiet: No active session yet. Pick a topic and start a focused block.
today.noNotesCaptured: No notes captured yet. Capture notes during sessions to build your archive.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your calm learning environment, session parameters, and user localization.
settings.workspaceDesc: Workspace behavior will be configured here later.
settings.accountDesc: Account settings will arrive after authentication.
settings.languageDesc: Choose your default workspace interface language.
settings.preferencesDesc: Configure focus session block lengths and feedback parameters.
settings.audioAlertsDesc: Play a soft, calming bell sound when session finishes.
settings.personalWorkspaceDesc: Local storage sandbox enabled. Database connection active.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently purge all paths, session histories, notes, and practice records from this browser session.
settings.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all workspace data? This cannot be undone.
settings.resetSuccess: Workspace data has been reset to default state.

paths.title: Learning Paths
paths.subtitle: Structure long-term learning into focused paths with topics, sessions, notes, and practice.
paths.noPathsFound: No learning paths found matching your criteria.
paths.noPathsFoundSub: Try clearing your search query or adjusting your filters.
paths.emptyDescriptionPlaceholder: Add a description via Configure Path to clarify what this path will help you accomplish.

topics.topicAddedDesc: "{title}" was successfully added to the roadmap.
topics.configureDesc: Tune the learning context, next step, and status for this topic.

signals.sessionDesc: Finish focused work on this topic.
signals.knowledgeDesc: Create at least one knowledge document.
signals.practiceDesc: Complete at least one practice task.
signals.resourceDesc: Attach a useful learning material to support the topic.
signals.practiceAttemptedDesc: Record at least one deliberate practice attempt.
signals.practiceSolvedDesc: Record a solved attempt to show applied understanding.
signals.incomplete: Complete a session, knowledge document, and practice task first.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.discardConfirm: Are you sure you want to discard this session? All timer progress will be lost.
sessions.progressTracksFocus: Session progress tracks this focus block only. Finish the session to save progress.
sessions.sessionCompletedDesc: Your focus time was recorded and progress has been saved.
sessions.inlineNotePrompt: What did you learn just now? Write it down to lock it in.
sessions.noResourcesAttached: No resources attached to this topic yet.
sessions.noOutputs: No outputs captured during this session.
sessions.addResourceDesc: Attach a focused reference to this topic. Add a link or upload a study file.
sessions.editResourceDesc: Keep the reference clear, useful, and tied to this learning topic.
sessions.descriptionPlaceholder: Why this resource belongs to the topic
sessions.fileSizeLimit: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF. Keep files under 10 MB.

commands.title: Command Center
commands.subtitle: Search learning context and jump directly to work.
commands.empty: No matching learning context. Try a path, topic, note, or workspace section.
commands.noCurrentLearningDesc: Start a topic session to create current learning context.

practice.title: Practice
practice.subtitle: Strengthen understanding through recall and application.
practice.dialogDesc: Create a self-recall task connected to one of your active topics.
practice.taskDescriptionPlaceholder: What should this task help you practice?
practice.recommendedReviewDesc: Start with the weakest recent attempt.
practice.recommendedActiveDesc: Continue the next useful practice step.
practice.recommendedSecuredDesc: Review evidence that is already reinforced.
practice.trainingSurfaceHint: Practice is evidence for topic mastery.
practice.createGuidance: Choose a topic and write what you want to train. Add details only when they clarify the exercise.
practice.nextActionBlocked: Review the weak point, then attempt again.
practice.nextActionRepeat: Repeat once more to reinforce memory.
practice.nextActionEvidence: Use this as learning evidence for the topic.
practice.configureDesc: Update details or permanently delete this practice task.
practice.emptyDesc: Add a practice task to start recalling and applying what you've learned.
practice.emptyNeedsReview: Nothing to review right now — great work!
practice.emptyInProgress: No tasks in progress. Pick one from Needs Review to begin.
practice.emptySecured: No knowledge secured yet. Complete practice tasks to see them here.
practice.noOtherTasks: No other tasks on your practice list.
practice.moreTasksAttached: +{count} more practice tasks attached to this topic
practice.attemptLoggedDesc: Your practice attempt has been logged.
practice.reflectionPlaceholder: What was hard? What should you review before the next attempt?
practice.recordAttemptSub: Choose what happened, then write what to reinforce next.

analytics.weeklyDesc: Focused study time distributed across days of the week.
analytics.pathProgressDesc: Mastered topics vs. total topics across all learning paths.
analytics.practiceReviewDesc: Distribution of practice tasks by status.

notes.noDocumentsSearch: Try a different search or clear the current filter.
notes.noDocumentsEmpty: Create a document and attach it to a topic to start building your knowledge base.
notes.guidanceTip1: Use / to insert headings, lists, checklists, code, tables, and dividers.
notes.guidanceTip2: Keep context scoped to this topic
notes.emptyContent: This document has no content yet. Switch to Edit Mode to start writing.
notes.selectDocumentDesc: Choose a document from the library or create one attached to a learning topic.
notes.selectDocumentContext: Select a document to see its learning context, review state, and writing cues.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Capture links and documents before deciding where they belong in your learning system.
inbox.quickCaptureDesc: Save useful material first. Assign it to a topic when the learning context is clear.
inbox.whyCaptureDesc: What should this help you learn?
inbox.queueDesc: Assign, study, or discard captured material.
inbox.emptyDesc: Capture a useful link or document, then assign it to the topic where it belongs.
inbox.discardedSuccessDesc: "{title}" has been removed from your inbox.
